title: Bill Tracker Spreadsheet Template
task_phrase: A person searching bill tracker spreadsheet template needs a useful answer-first bill tracker with export, without signup.
agent_task_phrase: Build and export a practical bill tracker spreadsheet for recurring bill management.
adoption_metric: organic clicks, qualified tool completions, exports/copies/saves, paid CTA clicks, checkout starts, purchases, and repeat use
install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/bill-tracker-spreadsheet-template/ and enter bill lines, then use Copy summary text or Download CSV.
trust_evidence: frequency normalization and export CSV generated client-side
versioned module listing and registry record
smoke_test: Fill one bill row (amount+frequency), click Recalculate, then download CSV and confirm a saved file with totals appears.
